title: arabis contracta subsp. hirsuta
intro: Arabis contracta subsp. hirsuta, also known as hairy rockcress, is a plant species that belongs to the genus Arabis in the family Brassicaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of hairy rockcress include reducing inflammation, treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and supporting the immune system. Hairy rockcress can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues and digestive problems.
